top_signals.title: Brent oil jumps more than 3% after Iran vows to retaliate for U.S. strikes
top_signals.summary: President Trump earlier said talks with Iran were "proceeding nicely," while warning that the U.S. could resume military action if discussions were to collapse.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Climbs as US-Iran Clashes Muddy Outlook for Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Oil rebounded as fresh clashes between the US and Iran clouded the outlook for an interim deal to reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Exchange of letters between the Governor and the Chancellor regarding CPI Inflation - April 2026
top_signals.summary: Exchange of letters between the Governor and the Chancellor
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Guidance: OFSI General licence INT/2024/4761108
top_signals.summary: Details for OFSI General licence INT/2024/4761108 - Funds of non-designated third parties involving designated credit or financial institutions (“Personal Remittances”)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Croatia Seriously Considering Zigman as New Central Bank Chief
top_signals.summary: Croatia is seriously considering Ante Zigman to head its central bank, according to a person familiar with the government’s thinking.
